When the HTTP listener fails to bind, the returned error message reports `opts.TCPAddress` instead of `opts.HTTPAddress`. This misidentifies the failing endpoint and can send operators to debug the wrong port/address during startup incidents.
## 2. HTTP listener bind failures report the wrong address

That dereferences `lastMemStats` before it is ever initialized, causing a nil-pointer panic. Because this happens in a goroutine without recovery, it can crash the entire `nsqd` process as soon as the first statsd interval fires when memstats reporting is enabled.
